title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Madras

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Madras
jsonLd.description:
IIT Madras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Madras:
IIT Madras is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Madras!
